# pexip_infinity_mjx_endpoint (Resource)

Manages an MJX endpoint with the Infinity service. MJX endpoints represent Microsoft Teams integrated endpoints such as Polycom, Cisco, and Webex devices that can be managed and monitored through Pexip Infinity for hybrid Teams deployments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_mjx_endpoint" "example" {
  name                = "Conference Room A"
  room_resource_email = "conf-room-a@example.com"
  api_address         = "192.168.1.50"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_address` (String) The IP address or FQDN of the endpoint's API. Maximum length: 255 characters.
- `name` (String) The name of the MJX endpoint. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `room_resource_email` (String) The email address of the room resource associated with this endpoint.

### Optional

- `api_password` (String, Sensitive) The password used by OTJ when accessing the endpoint's API; if left blank, the OTJ Profile default will be used. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `api_port` (Number) The port of the endpoint's API. Range: 1 to 65535. Default: 443 if HTTPS is used, otherwise 80 for HTTP.
- `api_username` (String) The username used by OTJ when accessing the endpoint's API; if left blank, the OTJ Profile default will be used. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `description` (String) Description of the MJX endpoint. Maximum length: 500 characters.
- `endpoint_type` (String) The type of MJX endpoint. Valid values: CISCO, POLY, WEBEX.
- `mjx_endpoint_group` (String) The MJX endpoint group URI this endpoint belongs to.
- `poly_password` (String, Sensitive) The password the endpoint will use when connecting and authenticating to the calendaring service on the Conferencing Node. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `poly_raise_alarms_for_this_endpoint` (Boolean) When enabled, an alarm will be raised if OTJ is unable to provide this endpoint with meeting information.
- `poly_username` (String) The username the endpoint will use when connecting and authenticating to the calendaring service on the Conferencing Node. Maximum length: 150 characters.
- `use_https` (String) Use HTTPS to access this endpoint's API. Valid choices: GLOBAL, NO, YES.
- `verify_cert` (String) Enable TLS verification when accessing the endpoint API. Only applicable if using HTTPS to access this endpoint's API. Valid choices: GLOBAL, NO, YES.
- `webex_device_id` (String) The Webex endpoint's unique identifier.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the MJX endpoint.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the MJX endpoint
